name: ballistics_reforged
title: Ballistics Reforged
author: Squishy1870, TheAppleIsALie, Klonan
contact: Squishy1870 via the Factorio Mod Portal
description: A rebuilt ballistics and battlefield-feel mod for Factorio 2.0 focused on projectile polish: physical bullet tracers, subtle/balanced/cinematic FX presets, impact layering, tuned shotgun behaviour, physical rockets with smoke and impact polish, arcing shells and throwables, turret projectile leading, and optional wall-blocked spitter shots. This is the first stable Ballistics Reforged release. It is a heavily modified GPL-3.0 derivative based on KS Combat / KS Combat Updated, rebuilt under a new mod identity with reorganised structure, new settings, new FX systems, and balance/polish passes.
